name: Daeyu Co., Ltd.
summary: Daeyu Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of foliar spray and fertigation fertilizers in South Korea. It offers daeyupride fertilizers; pesticide and preventive products, including fungicides, insecticides, PGR, herbicides, spreaders, rodenticides, and bird repellent products; and agricultural and organic inputs products. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
